name: libcgi-fast-perl
title: libcgi-fast-perl
summary: CGI subclass for work with FCGI
description:
CGI subclass for work with FCGI
CGI::Fast is a subclass of the CGI object created by CGI.pm. It is
specialized to work with the FCGI module, which greatly speeds up CGI scripts
by turning them into persistently running server processes. Scripts that
perform time-consuming initialization processes, such as loading large
modules or opening persistent database connections, will see large
performance improvements.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libcgi-fast-perl because CGI subclass for work with FCGI.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libcgi-fast-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libcgi-fast-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libcgi-fast-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
